original: A bag filled with creamy candy. The pieces are colorful and shaped like fruit. This product seems to be aimed towards bovine ladies; a happy cartoon cow says the candy is “made with the freshest milk from New Texas!”, while another speech bubble claims it “turns your milk into a fun and fruity flavor!”
